title: Physical Stats
description: Upgrade speed, strength, and size by consuming custom items. Each stat has 5 levels, affecting abilities and attributes.
body:
# Physical Stats
This Datapack/mod adds 3 new stats which define your physical condition, you can become a gigantic monster with slower movement, or a hyper fast runner! Or anything in between as well as a strong puncher :)

Each stat has 5 levels, and here are list of pros and cons of each:
### Size:
Increases player size by 0.085 per level
Decreases movement speed by 0.024 per level
Increases block and entity interaction range by 0.67 block per level
Increases max health by 4 (2 hearts) per level

### Speed:
Increases movement on land by 0.021 per level
Increases movement in water by 0.15 per level

### Strength:
Increases base knockback by 0.35 per level
Increases base damage by 0.33 per level

You can also reset all your statistic by eating a Reseter crafted with 9 rotten flesh

## Crafting
![Craftings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2770d4240c22b2a6ded0eee2cb74ad3c99b10eb2.png)
